title: Data Protection by Design — Encryption at Rest Missing
description: Storing personal data without encryption violates GDPR Article 25(1) (data protection by design and by default). Personal data at rest must be protected with appropriate technical measures.

finding.message: Potential unencrypted personal data storage at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Encrypt personal data at rest using AES-256; manage keys via a dedicated KMS.
Apply field-level encryption for particularly sensitive attributes (SSN, health data, financial data).
Implement database-level Transparent Data Encryption (TDE) as a baseline.
GDPR Article 25(1) requires technical measures to implement data minimization and protection by design.
